source: Mini-advisor — SQL queries against pg_catalog (a substitute for the raw Supabase get_advisors output which was 139KB security + 288KB performance, too large to ingest in one read).

raw_supabase_advisor_paths.note: Both raw files are on the host; not portable. Mini-advisor below recreates the substantive findings from pg_catalog and is reproducible from any session.

rls_no_policy_offenders.verdict: OK — RLS-on / no-policy is functionally service-role-only access. Skill says auth-RPC writes this table. Migrate as-is.
OK — empty, planned but unused. Drop in clean rebuild or carry as locked-down.

unindexed_foreign_keys.reason: Nicolife side-project — does not migrate to mrbeanies-prod
Planned MBG payments table — index FK to orders.

unindexed_foreign_keys.fix: CREATE INDEX ON public.product_costs(product_id);  -- only if keeping the table

unindexed_foreign_keys.reason: ACTIVE — hot read path on storefront category filter. Add this index on rebuild.
Active passkey auth. Indexed FK = faster cleanup_expired_auth_data sweeps.

actionable_indexes_for_rebuild: CREATE INDEX ON public.product_costs(product_id);  -- only if table is kept

security_definer_review.verdict: EXPECTED — Skill §4.3 lists the RPC catalog (place_customer_order, verify_customer_pin, is_admin, etc.). Re-review each on port to mrbeanies-prod and confirm search_path is locked (SET search_path = public, pg_temp).
security_definer_review.common_gotcha: SECURITY DEFINER functions with mutable search_path are CVE-class — verify each function header on port.
